description: Symbol is a knowledge base for AI context that lets users save structured capsules and types, then reuse them across AI tools. It provides hosted MCP access and a web app for storing, organizing, and sharing that context.
summary: Symbol exposes a preview REST API at `https://symbol.chat/api/preview` with an OpenAPI spec, plus a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.symbol.chat/mcp` that supports API-key auth and OAuth.
